generated_oml:
// C10: Models (Structural & Behavioral)
instance SysMLIBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram (IBD) capturing component‑and‑connector architecture as used in the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MBSERepository
]

instance ACMEArchitectureModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Architecture description in ACME ADL representing high‑level structural composition."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MBSERepository
]

instance AADLArchitectureModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AADL model describing software/hardware interfaces and timing constraints."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MBSERepository
]

instance MontiArcArchitectureModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MontiArc ADL model for component‑connector structures used in the twin."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MBSERepository
]

instance SysMLStateMachineModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML v1.7 state‑machine specifications refining behavioral logic of the twin."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MBSERepository
]

instance MontiArcAutomatonModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MontiArc Automaton extensions modeling discrete event behaviour."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MBSERepository
]

instance SimulinkSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink simulation model representing the twin's dynamic physics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationTool
]

instance CppImplementationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Implementation‑level model expressed in C++ generated from higher‑level artifacts."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CodeGenerator
]

instance JavaImplementationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Implementation‑level model expressed in Java generated from higher‑level artifacts."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CodeGenerator
]

// C10: Data (Abstraction Layers)
instance RequirementsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Requirements artefacts captured in the MBSE repository."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MBSERepository
]

instance FunctionalArchitectureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Functional architecture models (functions, interfaces) stored in the MBSE repository."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MBSERepository
]

instance LogicalArchitectureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Logical architecture models (components, connectors) stored in the MBSE repository."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MBSERepository
]

instance ProductTechnicalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Product/technical layer models (physical implementation) stored in the MBSE repository."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MBSERepository
]

// C11: Enablers (Tools & Platforms)
instance MBSERepository : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model‑Based Systems Engineering repository handling SysML, ACME, AADL, MontiArc artefacts."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelValidationService
]

instance SimulationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation environment (MathWorks Simulink) executing dynamic models."
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationExecutionService
]

instance CodeGenerator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Automatic code generation tool producing C++ or Java implementations from models."
    DTDFVocab:enables CodeGenerationService
]

// C6: Services
instance ModelValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service performing systematic validation & verification of MBSE models before code generation."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelValidationInsight
]

instance SimulationExecutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service executing Simulink simulations and returning runtime results."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]

instance CodeGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating executable C++/Java code from validated models."
    DTDFVocab:provides CodeGenerationAction
]

// C17: Insights / Actions
instance ModelValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating that MBSE models satisfy consistency and completeness checks."
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing quantitative simulation outcomes (e.g., performance metrics)."
]

instance CodeGenerationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to produce compiled software artifacts for the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle follows the MBSE abstraction hierarchy described in the document: (1) Requirements stage where stakeholder requirements are captured; (2) Functional architecture stage modeled with SysML requirement diagrams; (3) Logical architecture stage where functional blocks and their interfaces are specified using ADLs such as ACME, AADL, MontiArc and SysML internal block diagrams; (4) Product/technical layer where the physical instantiation is described and linked to simulation models (e.g., Simulink) or code (C++, Java). Transitions between stages are managed by traceability links in the MBSE toolchain, and governance is achieved through integration of heterogeneous stakeholder models."
]
